idea-plugin.name: Minecraft OAuth
idea-plugin.description:
Companion plugin for the Minecraft Dev plugin that lets you authenticate with a Microsoft (premium) account or set a cracked username before launching the Minecraft client from an IntelliJ run configuration.

Features:
  • Microsoft OAuth 2.0 login with PKCE (premium accounts)
  • Cracked / offline username support
  • Silent background token refresh — no re-login needed after everyday inactivity
  • Automatically wires up the Minecraft Client run configuration in new projects
  • Multiple account support with per-project run configuration name override

action.description: Login with Microsoft for premium Minecraft
